title: National Policy Statement for nuclear energy generation (EN-7)
body: " The National Policy Statement for nuclear energy generation (EN-7) came into force on 18 December 2025.   This guidance makes it easier for decision makers, applicants and the wider public to understand:   government policy on the need for nationally significant infrastructure projects (NSIPs) using nuclear fission to generate energy how applications for these projects will be assessed the way in which impacts and mitigations will be judged   We have provided supplementary information to:   help developers navigate the planning framework support requests for additional information and guidance   "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
